name: regionalizador-monorepo
description: Regionalizador — monorepo com backend FastAPI e frontend Next.js

scripts.test: echo 'Run pytest in backend/ and npm test in frontend/ separately.' && exit 0
scripts.graph:open: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p='graphify-out/graph.html';if(fs.existsSync(p)){require('child_process').exec('start ' + p);}else{console.error('Run npm run graph:build first.');process.exit(1);}"
